title: ETH Rangers Program Recap

title: Treasury Staking Initiative
description: The Ethereum Foundation has begun staking a portion of its treasury, in line with its Treasury Policy announced last year.  Approximately 70,000 ETH is being staked with rewards directed back to the EF treasury....

title: The Ethereum Foundation's Commitment to DeFi

title: An update from Tomasz
description: tl;dr  I am stepping down from my co-ED role at the EF at the end of February 2026. Bastian Aue is taking over the co-ED role alongside Hsiao-Wei. The future is bright for builders, for Ethereum, for the EF, and for me....

title: Devcon 8 is coming to Mumbai, India in November 2026
description: Devcon, the Ethereum community’s annual global gathering for builders, will take place from 3-6 November 2026 at the JIO World Center in Mumbai, India.  This Devcon 8 update is not a full vision, but will help organizers and the wider ecosystem plan.

title: Shipping an L1 zkEVM #2: The Security Foundations
